final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single-page knowledge card illustration for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon / illustrated-storybook aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large knowledge card layout with a clear title at top, key story bullet points listed with punctuation on the side, and the main card area unfolding the story in cartoon narrative panels or scenes
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, presented in child-friendly cartoon form
Scene/backdrop: must include 赤壁 river battle setting with fire, ships, and period atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a lively, engaging children's-book atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, vibrant, child-friendly direction — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a cartoon illustration surface treatment — exact line weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the main title (large, prominent); must include key story bullet points listed on the side with Chinese punctuation marks
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title must be clearly legible; bullet points must be visually separated and annotated with punctuation; story content must be age-appropriate for children
Avoid:
